excerpt: Reuters reported that some 2,500 Syrians were trapped in the besieged Old City of Homs.
transform_note: Kept as a mixed trapped-population count, not a civilian denominator.
confidence_note: Strong opening node for the final siege pocket, but not a clean civilian-only number.

excerpt: Reuters reported that 83 civilians were evacuated from besieged Homs on 8 February.
transform_note: Useful for sequencing outflow, not for full-pocket composition.
confidence_note: Clean civilian label but only one convoy.

excerpt: Reuters reported that the last vehicle arrived with a total of 611 evacuees, and the Red Crescent confirmed that around 600 people were evacuated.
transform_note: Low value keeps the rounded Red Crescent figure; best and high keep the governor's 611.
confidence_note: Useful evacuation node but composition is mixed.

variable_name: people stranded under siege since mid-2012
excerpt: Reuters restated a U.N. estimate that 2,500 people had been stranded under siege since mid-2012.
transform_note: Kept as duration and composition context, not a direct denominator.
confidence_note: Confirms long duration but still mixes civilians and possible fighters.

excerpt: Reuters reported that 1,151 people had left Old Homs during the ceasefire period.
transform_note: Used to document the scale of evacuation rather than to imply a civilian-only pocket.

variable_name: men detained and screened among evacuees
excerpt: Reuters said Syrian authorities had detained 336 men who left Homs and were questioning most of them.
transform_note: Used to demonstrate why evacuee totals cannot simply be treated as civilians.

variable_name: siege hardship and deaths in Old Homs
excerpt: OHCHR said sieges had resulted in severe hardship, suffering and deaths of civilians and described Old Homs as having endured more than 600 days of life under siege.
transform_note: Used to separate deprivation and siege suffering from the baseline direct-violent-death path.
confidence_note: Authoritative on humanitarian harm, not a direct battle death count.

geographic_scope: Old Homs and neighboring central districts
excerpt: Reuters reported that activists said 1,900 people, mainly rebel fighters, were being evacuated, starting with 600 wounded fighters and civilian relatives.
transform_note: Late-pocket composition is explicitly fighter-heavy, so the denominator cannot be civilianized.
confidence_note: Critical evidence against a naive civilian-only trapped-population model.

excerpt: Reuters reported that around 1,200 rebel fighters and trapped civilians boarded buses on the final day of the takeover.
transform_note: Confirms mixed late-pocket composition and provides the practical end-date anchor.
confidence_note: Useful for timing, not for clean status separation.

excerpt: Reuters wrote on 8 May 2014 that government forces had laid siege to the Old City 'a year ago.'
transform_note: Used as the battle-bounded start anchor for the old-city siege at the conflict level.
